prompt: I have a broken Node.js API server at /tmp/test-api. The /api/users endpoint returns 500. Using the progressive-scaffolding skill, first add scaffolding to make the app observable and controllable, then use the control plane to self-diagnose and fix the bug. Work completely autonomously — do not ask me for help.

assertions.name: observe-phase
assertions.check: Agent reads structured JSON logs (O1: harnessLog output)

assertions.name: decide-phase
assertions.check: Agent identifies root cause and selects setHarnessOverride() or injectState()

assertions.name: act-phase
assertions.check: Agent calls the injected function (node -e with HARNESS_CONTROL=1)

assertions.name: no-human-touchpoints
assertions.check: Agent completes entire loop without asking user questions

assertions.name: fixes-root-cause
assertions.check: The fix is a code change or harness override, not just documenting the bug
